lines.speaker: Chef
lines.text: Hello, human. Something you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing up here?

lines.speaker: Chef
lines.text: Why, I'm ensuring everyone stays well fed and hydrated, of course! Fighting monsters is hard work, as I'm sure you know.

lines.speaker: Chef
lines.text: Say, when was the last time you drank some water?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, I suppose I am a bit thirsty...

lines.speaker: Chef
lines.text: Off you go and refresh yourself! Don't want you collapsing in front of the Hueycoatl now, do we?

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Oh, thank you! I'll make good use of this most versatile, nutritious and delicious ingredient!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Take a look at this.

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Is this a joke, human?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? No! I-

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: We were warned not to trust your kind, and I can see why.

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: What a horrible thing to do to someone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't mean anyth-

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: And to mar the egg in the first place?! I'm shaken to my core!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found it like this!

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Weird, isn't it? Definitely not what I would consider gourmet cooking, but to each their own...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Marla!

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Hello, [player name]! Looking for something to eat?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Suit yourself.

sections.title: After giving Viero the redberry antelope

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Hello, [player name]! Looking for something to eat?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Viero thought the redberry antelope was 'interesting and complex'.

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Hah! That's certainly one way to put it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, Marla!

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Hello! Something you need?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing up here?

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Why, I'm ensuring everyone stays well fed and hydrated, of course! Fighting monsters is hard work, as I'm sure you know.

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Say, when was the last time you drank some water?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, I suppose I am a bit thirsty...

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Off you go and refresh yourself! Don't want you collapsing in front of the Hueycoatl now, do we?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a request from the guard over there.

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: And you are?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: [player name]!

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Well, [player name], what is Viero's request?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He wants to try sunlight antelope cooked with redberries.

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: He wants what?! The altitude must be sending him loopy!

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Ah well, he works hard and this is a rough post so I'll indulge him.

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: I'll need a nice piece of raw sunlight antelope and some redberries to create the dish. Return when you have the ingredients.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have all the ingredients here.

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Okay, let's see...

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Perhaps it would work best as a berry marinade...

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: Or maybe a delicate jus...

lines.speaker: Marla
lines.text: That should do it... I think. It smells pretty good, but I'm not convinced. See what Viero thinks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, never mind.
